name: rate_type_backwards_compatibility
description: Verify that existing queries without rate_type_match_column_params produce identical SQL (no behavior change)
expected_query: with "tac6ef26a8eda8b23be4bdb296fe7ed76" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" as "pid", SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."psr_pid"), "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" as materialized (select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS m_3bf5855c3202 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."targeted_receiver_separation" in ('OPEN', 'WIDE_OPEN') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid) select "player"."pid", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379.m_3bf5855c3202) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(tac6ef26a8eda8b23be4bdb296fe7ed76.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS trg_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "tac6ef26a8eda8b23be4bdb296fe7ed76" on "tac6ef26a8eda8b23be4bdb296fe7ed76"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" on "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
